name: Tina Smith
subject: The commitment we make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
To all the veterans who served this nation and to the family members who support them: thank you for your service.

| Team -- Today is Veterans Day.

It's a time to recognize those who risked their lives to protect us all. It's a time to honor our brave military servicemembers who remain in harm's way. And it's a time to remember our moral obligation, today and every day, to support those who served, along with their families.

**We have no greater duty and responsibility as a nation than to take care of our servicemembers when they return because the battles they face don't end when they come home.**

Truly honoring our brave servicemembers means ensuring they have access to the best health care available, career training, transition services, higher education, and so much more.

In the Senate, I take this duty very seriously. That's why I helped introduce legislation to get veterans the health care they deserve and to allow veteran farmers access to the services they need. And I fought to tackle homelessness among veterans and to ensure our veterans don't have to wait months before getting lifesaving treatment from the VA.

It takes incredible courage and sacrifice to safeguard this country we love, along with its people. We owe it to those who do so to honor and thank them for their bravery -- and make a commitment to stand with them in every way.

To all of you who've served this nation and to the family members who support them: **thank you for your service.**

You've fought for us and now, I will continue fighting for you in the Senate.

-- Tina
---

name: Bennet for America
subject: Breakfast with Bennet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hi Friends,

If you've ever run into Michael on the campaign trail, it's probably at a diner. There isn't an old-school breakfast spot he hasn't discovered in the small towns across Iowa, New Hampshire, and beyond--you name it, he's there. And he's got a solid order every time: fried eggs, sausage, rye toast, and whatever the special is that day.

That's why we're excited to announce that we're launching Breakfast with Bennet.

[By making a contribution of any size to the campaign (even $1!), you'll be automatically entered to join Michael for breakfast on the campaign trail!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae0b/134673f2/a708383/6997c7ca/2501536498/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The cost of the flight and hotel - plus breakfast - will be on us for you and a guest. This is a chance for Michael to share his favorite meal with you and to hear about the issues that are important to you.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae0b/134673f2/a708383/6997c7ca/2501536498/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Looking forward to meeting you!

Bennet for America Team
---

* * *
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by December 11, 2019 at 11:59 p.m. ET. Enter for free [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae0b/134673f2/a708383/6997c7c8/2501536498/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/breakfast-with-bennet-free"), or enter by contributing to Bennet for America by clicking [here](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae0b/134673f2/a708383/6997c7ca/2501536498/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000"). One (1) winner will receive the following Prize (the "Prize"): Two (2) roundtrip plane tickets to the breakfast location from within all fifty states, District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico; one (1) hotel room in the city of the breakfast location; two (2) breakfast meals. Approximate retail value of the prize: $1,500.

Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of fifty United States, the District of Columbia and Puerto Rico, and are 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae0b/134673f2/a708383/6997c7ce/2501536498/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/breakfast-with-bennet-rules/") and additional restrictions on eligibility.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I get it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, My team set an aggressive goal of raising $550,000 by Friday at midnight. I know that's a steep target for an underdog campaign like ours, but it matters. We believe this investment will help get our message out at a critical time and help us qualify for the December debate. And I know this team can rise up to a challenge. By our math, we need exactly 409 donors from Pennsylvania to meet our goal. [**Will you make one of those critical donations right now?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191111_CB_20191111-fr-CB-MG1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The constant influx of fundraising emails and goal setting can feel like a lot -- I get it. But the reason we do it is because our campaign is being funded by people like you, chipping in whatever they can, whenever they can. I've pledged not to take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and pharma executives because I believe that in order to govern the right way, you can't campaign the wrong way. So what do you say? [**Will you help us keep building this campaign the right way and be one of the donors I need from Pennsylvania to hit our ambitious goal?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191111_CB_20191111-fr-CB-MG1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks. This is the best team out there.
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191111_CB_20191111-fr-CB-MG1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a86/5fca0d19/79b37e60/291c6777/3977843820/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a86/5fca0d19/79b37e60/291c6776/3977843820/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a86/5fca0d19/79b37e60/291c6775/3977843820/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a86/5fca0d19/79b37e60/291c6774/3977843820/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a86/5fca0d19/79b37e60/291c6773/3977843820/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a86/5fca0d19/79b37e60/291c6777/3977843820/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: Empty promises
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
After what I went through in 2018, I want to ensure none of my colleagues endure the same level of multi-million-dollar smears, dark money, and attacks from the Left. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)
---
N/A,

Last year, I staved off a politically unthinkable occurrence - a Democratic takeover in Texas. In the process of battling back the Democrats' blue wave, I learned what it takes to survive the most expensive Senate race in United States history.

After what I went through in the 2018 election, I want to ensure none of my colleagues endure the same level of multi-million-dollar attacks, dark money, and smears from the Left.

**[Unfortunately, that's exactly what my friend and colleague Martha McSally is already facing in Arizona, and she needs our help.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)**

| [ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)
---

Martha joined the U.S. Senate in January, and within the first month of her appointment, Democrats were already spending six-figures against her.

It's not hard to see why Democrats are after Martha. **She's a no-nonsense problem-solver who's immune to political intimidation and hardwired to tackle challenges head on.** That in itself is a problem for Democrats, especially when it comes to major issues like immigration.

Martha lives in a border state, so the issue is front and center for her. She's been vocal about the crisis that's happening on our borders, the threat to public safety, and Democrats' flat out refusal to compromise on any solution.

Martha's not afraid to call out divisive Democrats for their obstinance, which I applaud, but Democrats loathe. [**That's why the Left is rabid at the thought of defeating Martha and turning Arizona blue.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)

[ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)
---

If you look at the map, the Democrat blue wave is spreading through western states, and Arizona is the only state stopping them from flooding more red states.

The Left is well aware of this, and that's why **Arizona is expected to become the most expensive, competitive battleground race in 2020.** In fact, they're already raising and spending millions like the state has never seen.

[**Having just gone through a similar ordeal, I know what it takes to win, and it's going to require our consistent support. Will you join me in helping Martha McSally hold Arizona?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)

N/A, Martha's race isn't just about Arizona. It's about the future of the Senate majority. Last cycle, Democrats thought their path to Senate control ran through Texas, and now, they're using the same playbook in Arizona.

[**With help from committed conservatives like you, I was able to battle back their blue wave and win, and with our help Martha McSally will keep Arizona red in 2020.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)

[ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)
---

Make no mistake, the radical policies Democrats are pushing aren't empty promises - they're the very real consequences we're facing if we lose the Senate - tax hikes, open borders, sanctuary cities, expanded healthcare mandates, and constitutional restrictions.

We can put a stop to their extremism, but we've got to have the numbers in the Senate to do it. [**That's why it's absolutely critical that we help Martha McSally defend her seat, hold Arizona, and keep the Senate red.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)

For Liberty,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)
Ted Cruz

[ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441343:WtoHsQvPN:m:1:2105898951:A65585B27E19BD833F23A916285F5075:r)
---

| Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc.

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 11/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! Today is Veterans Day. I want to thank all the veterans for their service and protecting our country and our state! Tennessee has produced many leaders along with nearly 500,000 veterans. I am committed to fighting for veterans and to fixing to improve our VA Systems, improve mental health treatment, and to protect Millington Naval Base, Arnold Air Force Base, Fort Campbell, and other military facilities from cuts or closures. Last week, I was honored to announce "Veterans for Dr. Manny" and I am thankful for all the support that I have gotten from veterans across Tennessee. [Click the link](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-y/)[ to check out the entire list of members of this coaltion.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-j/) This past weekend, I was able to speak to the Wilson County Republican Party, Mark Green's Fish Fry, and met up with the National Young Republican Federation. I loved getting the chance to meet some fellow young conservatives. **Media: ** Our social media post of the week comes from Vol Market #3 with my good friend Congressman Tim Burchett. I greatly appreciate him having me and for everyone who came out. We had an awesome time meeting supporters and newcomers alike. Thanks for having me Tim! [Here's a small write-up by Brian Hornback from this event.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-t/) Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-i/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-d/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-h/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-k/) As always, thank you so much for your continued support. It means the world to me. Dr. Manny P.S. Would you mind chipping in to our campaign? We sure would appreciate it. [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jddrtjit-uunkhiuw-u/) |
| |

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Newark Star-Ledger: "Joe Sestak: Why we need defense reform”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**We have lost command of the Western Pacific to China, according to our Pacific Commander. Does anyone else in the current presidential field know how to reform the military to be more effective at less cost, by harnessing cyber and other new technologies?**
In **my op-ed in the Newark Star-Ledger** (below), I wrote that while our military still ranks as the best in the world, it is losing that position because too many vested interests hold it back from responding to the challenges of tomorrow instead of those of yesteryear. **The issue is not how much money we are spending, but how we are spending it. We need to transform our military forces** by focusing on force posture, not force structure. Instead of measuring military readiness in terms of overall size and numbers, we must focus on metrics of capability, particularly in technology, and positioning.
For example, rather than buying more submarines at $2 billion each, we can develop a netted sensor information system to track enemy submarines, and then direct an aircraft to drop a torpedo for the “kill.” This is even more germane as water becomes translucent, eventually transparent, by emerging technologies. **Rather than double-down on less relevant, expensive units, we must invest in new technology that gives us better capability, not just more unnecessary capacity at more cost.**
We need to realize that **the key battlefield today is no longer necessarily on land, on air or on sea – it is in cyberspace**. Some of the greatest national security threats we face cannot be defeated or defended by traditional military hardware, but only by greatly enhanced cyberspace warfare, including both offensive cyber-warfare and cyber-security.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11781277/120410687/1036341175?refcode=em111119defense&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjE2NmMxOS01ZDA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8Phv-tC7CUqUbWn5ha9nKkd8FkxOLOiqQcXlKC14M0=)
Precisely how such technological capability affects traditional warfare is why numbers as the measure of our military might are obsolete. Take the most powerful Navy “unit" — the aircraft carrier. Today, one carrier can strike eight times the targets in 24 hours as it could two decades ago — giving us 80 carrier equivalents as compared to just 10 carriers a few years ago. An investment in the new domain of cyberspace from just 10 carrier equivalents (1 carrier “unit”) would provide an immense growth in warfare capability.
**In fact, our Pacific commander now says that we have lost command of the Western Pacific — the first loss of command of the seas since World War II.** He has said that **we need to redirect our investment to put more into cyberspace.**
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11781279/120410697/1036341175?refcode=em111119defense&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjE2NmMxOS01ZDA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8Phv-tC7CUqUbWn5ha9nKkd8FkxOLOiqQcXlKC14M0=)
**We need smart defense reform that can allow us to do more with less** – focusing on cyberspace, sensors, robotics, artificial intelligence and other new technologies that reflect what our military needs today. We must break out of the paradigm of the military–industrial–congressional complex. **Without such reform, we will permit those innovative warriors of other nations such as China to command future warfare.**
**Who else in the field knows the Department of Defense and how to build a more effective, more efficient military for the 21st century?[Please contribute to ensure I can be a voice for a smart national security policies in this presidential race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11781280/120410701/723115086?refcode=em111119defense&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjE2NmMxOS01ZDA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8Phv-tC7CUqUbWn5ha9nKkd8FkxOLOiqQcXlKC14M0=)**
Warmest regards,
Joe

clean_body: Peter, We have lost command of the Western Pacific to China, according to our Pacific Commander. Does anyone else in the current presidential field know how to reform the military to be more effective at less cost, by harnessing cyber and other new technologies? In my op-ed in the Newark Star-Ledger (below), I wrote that while our military still ranks as the best in the world, it is losing that position because too many vested interests hold it back from responding to the challenges of tomorrow instead of those of yesteryear. The issue is not how much money we are spending, but how we are spending it. We need to transform our military forces by focusing on force posture, not force structure. Instead of measuring military readiness in terms of overall size and numbers, we must focus on metrics of capability, particularly in technology, and positioning. For example, rather than buying more submarines at $2 billion each, we can develop a netted sensor information system to track enemy submarines, and then direct an aircraft to drop a torpedo for the “kill.” This is even more germane as water becomes translucent, eventually transparent, by emerging technologies. Rather than double-down on less relevant, expensive units, we must invest in new technology that gives us better capability, not just more unnecessary capacity at more cost. We need to realize that the key battlefield today is no longer necessarily on land, on air or on sea – it is in cyberspace. Some of the greatest national security threats we face cannot be defeated or defended by traditional military hardware, but only by greatly enhanced cyberspace warfare, including both offensive cyber-warfare and cyber-security. = Precisely how such technological capability affects traditional warfare is why numbers as the measure of our military might are obsolete. Take the most powerful Navy “unit" — the aircraft carrier. Today, one carrier can strike eight times the targets in 24 hours as it could two decades ago — giving us 80 carrier equivalents as compared to just 10 carriers a few years ago. An investment in the new domain of cyberspace from just 10 carrier equivalents (1 carrier “unit”) would provide an immense growth in warfare capability. In fact, our Pacific commander now says that we have lost command of the Western Pacific — the first loss of command of the seas since World War II. He has said that we need to redirect our investment to put more into cyberspace. = We need smart defense reform that can allow us to do more with less – focusing on cyberspace, sensors, robotics, artificial intelligence and other new technologies that reflect what our military needs today. We must break out of the paradigm of the military–industrial–congressional complex. Without such reform, we will permit those innovative warriors of other nations such as China to command future warfare. Who else in the field knows the Department of Defense and how to build a more effective, more efficient military for the 21st century?= Warmest regards, Joe Link to article: = Come on board. We encourage you to and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times. name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Reminder: John Berendt, Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil, and me -- Thursday, November 14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Here's a unique opportunity.

Join John Berendt, best selling author of Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil and formerly with Esquire and New York Magazine, on Thursday, November 14th at 6:30pm. The reception for me is at his Upper West Side home, featured in Architectural Digest.

I will be leading a lively discussion about the important issues facing our country and telling stories from the campaign trail.

More details are below. To RSVP and/or contribute online, click here. To RSVP by email click here.

Warmly,
Joe

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
In a time of uncertainty, with Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession and a Nation fighting terrorism around the world, spend the evening with one of our Country's true leaders, and envision a bold future.

Join Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
at a Fundraiser on Thursday, November 14
hosted by Amy and Ken Ferris, Carol and Mark Herman, Paul Scoles, Roger Smith, Megan Strub and Doug Manion, Sean Strub, Diana Wiener, Bob Worth

* Former 3-star Admiral; commander of aircraft carrier battle group
* Interacted with Presidents, Parliamentary Members, and leaders of Ministries
* President Clinton’s Director of Defense Policy; head of Navy’s Strategic Anti-Terrorism Unit
* PhD in Political Economy & Government and Masters in Public Administration from Harvard
* Former U.S. Congressman; Vice Chairman, Small Business Committee; most productive Congressperson in his class; saved over 800 homes from foreclosure
* Elected and re-elected (by 20 points) in a 2-1 Republican Congressional District
* Challenged former Republican Senator Arlen Specter and won the primary, after being 40 points down.

Joe is running to unite this country, convene the world under U.S. leadership, and to bring about pragmatic policies that move America forward and serve all Americans.

His presidential campaign launched on June 23 in Iowa. The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[Joe] impresses with experience, smarts and discipline..." and The National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race. Joe has launched his TV ads and walked 'in our shoes' across New Hampshire , meeting people and discussing their challenges. His showing in the latest CNN poll clearly demonstrates these actions have resonated.

Come and learn more about Joe’s Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] , and the restoration of trust, unity and accountability.

Thursday, November 14 at 6:30 p.m.
at the Home of John Berendt
Pulitzer Prize Finalist for Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil
135 W. 87th Street (between Amsterdam and Columbus)
New York, NY 10024

Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250
To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception111419]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/02ef87d1-5b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/7c749f11-6405-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yzc0OWYxMS02NDA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpowDWaW1TXoobRGn5qodxKxzyz5nhZjqg0JpfdtRMY=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Very real consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
After what I went through in 2018, I want to ensure none of my colleagues endure the same level of multi-million-dollar smears, dark money, and attacks from the Left. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)
---
Peter,

Last year, I staved off a politically unthinkable occurrence - a Democratic takeover in Texas. In the process of battling back the Democrats' blue wave, I learned what it takes to survive the most expensive Senate race in United States history.

After what I went through in the 2018 election, I want to ensure none of my colleagues endure the same level of multi-million-dollar attacks, dark money, and smears from the Left.

**[Unfortunately, that's exactly what my friend and colleague Martha McSally is already facing in Arizona, and she needs our help.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)**

| [ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)
---

Martha joined the U.S. Senate in January, and within the first month of her appointment, Democrats were already spending six-figures against her.

It's not hard to see why Democrats are after Martha. **She's a no-nonsense problem-solver who's immune to political intimidation and hardwired to tackle challenges head on.** That in itself is a problem for Democrats, especially when it comes to major issues like immigration.

Martha lives in a border state, so the issue is front and center for her. She's been vocal about the crisis that's happening on our borders, the threat to public safety, and Democrats' flat out refusal to compromise on any solution.

Martha's not afraid to call out divisive Democrats for their obstinance, which I applaud, but Democrats loathe. [**That's why the Left is rabid at the thought of defeating Martha and turning Arizona blue.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)

[ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)
---

If you look at the map, the Democrat blue wave is spreading through western states, and Arizona is the only state stopping them from flooding more red states.

The Left is well aware of this, and that's why **Arizona is expected to become the most expensive, competitive battleground race in 2020.** In fact, they're already raising and spending millions like the state has never seen.

[**Having just gone through a similar ordeal, I know what it takes to win, and it's going to require our consistent support. Will you join me in helping Martha McSally hold Arizona?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)

Peter, Martha's race isn't just about Arizona. It's about the future of the Senate majority. Last cycle, Democrats thought their path to Senate control ran through Texas, and now, they're using the same playbook in Arizona.

[**With help from committed conservatives like you, I was able to battle back their blue wave and win, and with our help Martha McSally will keep Arizona red in 2020.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)

[ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)
---

Make no mistake, the radical policies Democrats are pushing aren't empty promises - they're the very real consequences we're facing if we lose the Senate - tax hikes, open borders, sanctuary cities, expanded healthcare mandates, and constitutional restrictions.

We can put a stop to their extremism, but we've got to have the numbers in the Senate to do it. [**That's why it's absolutely critical that we help Martha McSally defend her seat, hold Arizona, and keep the Senate red.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)

For Liberty,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)
Ted Cruz

[ STAND WITH MARTHA »](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53441664:sxmiLQvN_:m:1:2132176598:7EC563957D152C42256E41DAB366AC20:r)
---

| Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc.
---

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Mare Island
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

As a Vietnam combat veteran and co-chair of the House Military Veterans caucus, I take our collective responsibility to support our men and women in uniform very seriously.

That's why I've introduced a bipartisan bill to repair the Mare Island Cemetery and transfer its ownership to the Department of Veterans Affairs. It's the government's responsibility to provide upkeep of this cemetery and ensure that it is preserved for generations to come.

[I need you to stand with me in calling for action. Tell Congress to pass this bill and properly honor the sacrifice of our nation's veterans ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GGPA6gfYpPhxSdGdiMq0EzELQmUZqtPn_gPhTxjj30=/_ROnubNYvL3AgpO5qCG7YgAIDIQSACkLWjumyTntuCA=)

**[SIGN ON](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GGPA6gfYpPhxSdGdiMq0EzELQmUZqtPn_gPhTxjj30=/_ROnubNYvL3AgpO5qCG7YgAIDIQSACkLWjumyTntuCA=)**
The more than 800 veterans interred at Mare Island dedicated their lives to serving our country. Ensuring that this important landmark is properly maintained is essential to respecting their service.

[Will you add your name to join me in properly honoring the legacy and service of our veterans? ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GGPA6gfYpPhxSdGdiMq0EzELQmUZqtPn_gPhTxjj30=/_ROnubNYvL3AgpO5qCG7YgAIDIQSACkLWjumyTntuCA=)

Thanks for standing with me.

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GGPA6gfYpPhxSdGdiMq0EzELQmUZqtPn_gPhTxjj30=/_ROnubNYvL3AgpO5qCG7YgAIDIQSACkLWjumyTntuCA=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GGPA6gfYpPhxSdGdiMq0EzELQmUZqtPn_gPhTxjj30=/wwmEYFyPcFQsX5QDOLTuUfASBEiSu_GBoN9SzNjq2Gs=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_90DO_191112_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

_We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7GGPA6gfYpPhxSdGdiMq0EzELQmUZqtPn_gPhTxjj30=/G9XV7P0i8r5DHhFTGu0RkSsKwk43uvNg-X9qBRjxJGs=)_

Senate Democrats Block $46 Million Dollar Federal Grant For NH Schools
---
Last Friday, Democrats on the Joint Legislative Fiscal Committee voted to block the state of New Hampshire from receiving a federal grant that would have provided _$46 million in federal aid to NH Public Schools._ The message Democrats are sending to NH parents is clear, they are more interested in keeping the teacher unions happy than supporting innovative new programs that improve the education for thousands of students across the state that learn better in a non-traditional environment. We have to get rid of the Democrats in Concord and bring back a **Republican Majority** to the State House! name: Wendy Davis
subject: I'm ready to take a stand, friend. I'm running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress](https://go
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900970/807608294/VEsH/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_template?refcode=dav_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1")

| | Six years ago, I sat behind my desk on the floor of the Texas State Senate, preparing to speak. My heart was racing as I took the microphone and rose to my feet. "Members, I'm rising on the floor today to humbly give voice to thousands of Texans who have been ignored." \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Dear friend, Six years ago, I sat behind my desk on the floor of the Texas State Senate, preparing to speak. My heart was racing as I took the microphone and rose to my feet. "Members, I'm rising on the floor today to humbly give voice to thousands of Texans who have been ignored." The Senate was trying to pass a bill that would strip critical services from women's health and drastically limit a woman's right to make decisions about her own body. Thousands of Texans had journeyed to the Capitol the day before to give testimony about how this extreme bill would hurt them and their loved ones, but the leadership cut them off, telling them that their stories had become 'repetitive.' I rose and read story after story of heart-wrenching experiences from women and families all across Texas. Over the next 13 hours, I had the privilege of reading their personal accounts, stories that moved me and many of you to tears. And people took notice. YOU showed up, whether in person or watching online. So many of you stood within and outside the Capitol that our work became known, rightly so, as the "People's Filibuster." Even President Obama recognized our collective work, tweeting that "something special is happening in Austin tonight." Generations of Texas mothers and daughters stood together as we shouted down an injustice. **We stood together because the voices of Texans were being ignored. Our stories weren 't being told. We felt that no one was listening. And we all believed, simply, that what was happening just wasn't right.** That's why I entered public service in the first place - to raise up the stories of those who feel left behind and cut off from the opportunity to realize their dreams. It's why I started a non-profit that trains young women in the skills needed to be effective advocates, helping them own their voice and their power. [**And, now, it 's why I'm running for Congress, friend. Our campaign is powered by people like you -- please chip in whatever you can.**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900973/807608294/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkYXZfbW9udGhseV9vbmJvYXJkIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkRBVl9FTV9PQl9PbmJvYXJkaW5nMjAxOV9VMV9YMSIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_onboard?refcode=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=2+-+And+now+itrsquos+why+Irsquom+running+for&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1") Texans don't quit. The fear of a challenge has never stopped me from standing up to fight for what is right. It's never stopped you either. Our families and future generations are counting on us. When I look at my beautiful grandchildren, Ellis and Sawyer, I wonder: who will tell their stories? Who will fight for them? I know you feel the same way when you look at your children and grandchildren. I'm running for Congress to give voice to the millions of Americans who have been ignored, whose stories aren't being told. Whose voices aren't being heard. [**I 'm ready to take another stand. Will you, once again, take a stand and join me in this fight?**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900972/807608294/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkYXZfbW9udGhseV9vbmJvYXJkIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkRBVl9FTV9PQl9PbmJvYXJkaW5nMjAxOV9VMV9YMSIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_onboard?refcode=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=3+-+Irsquom+ready+to+take+another+stand+Will&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1") I'm counting on you, because I know I can. Much love,
Wendy | | | [Donate](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_onboard?refcode=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=4+-+Donate&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1")
---

P.S. -- This campaign is going to be powered by grassroots supporters like you. **[You can make a secure donation here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900974/807608294/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkYXZfbW9udGhseV9vbmJvYXJkIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkRBVl9FTV9PQl9PbmJvYXJkaW5nMjAxOV9VMV9YMSIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_onboard?refcode=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=5+-+You+can+make+a+secure+donation+here&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1")** and if you haven't already, can stay up to date with the latest in our campaign by liking our page on [**Facebook**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900977/807608294/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.facebook.com/wendydavistexas/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=6+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1") and by following us on [**Instagram**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900976/807608294/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://www.instagram.com/wendydavistexas?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=7+-+Instagram&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1") and **[Twitter.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361b00/704929dc/1665fde8/39900969/807608294/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://twitter.com/wendydavis?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=8+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_OB_Onboarding2019_U1_X1")**

clean_body: | "" | | Six years ago, I sat behind my desk on the floor of the Texas State Senate, preparing to speak. My heart was racing as I took the microphone and rose to my feet. "Members, I'm rising on the floor today to humbly give voice to thousands of Texans who have been ignored." \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Dear friend, Six years ago, I sat behind my desk on the floor of the Texas State Senate, preparing to speak. My heart was racing as I took the microphone and rose to my feet. "Members, I'm rising on the floor today to humbly give voice to thousands of Texans who have been ignored." The Senate was trying to pass a bill that would strip critical services from women's health and drastically limit a woman's right to make decisions about her own body. Thousands of Texans had journeyed to the Capitol the day before to give testimony about how this extreme bill would hurt them and their loved ones, but the leadership cut them off, telling them that their stories had become 'repetitive.' I rose and read story after story of heart-wrenching experiences from women and families all across Texas. Over the next 13 hours, I had the privilege of reading their personal accounts, stories that moved me and many of you to tears. And people took notice. YOU showed up, whether in person or watching online. So many of you stood within and outside the Capitol that our work became known, rightly so, as the "People's Filibuster." Even President Obama recognized our collective work, tweeting that "something special is happening in Austin tonight." Generations of Texas mothers and daughters stood together as we shouted down an injustice. We stood together because the voices of Texans were being ignored. Our stories weren 't being told. We felt that no one was listening. And we all believed, simply, that what was happening just wasn't right. That's why I entered public service in the first place - to raise up the stories of those who feel left behind and cut off from the opportunity to realize their dreams. It's why I started a non-profit that trains young women in the skills needed to be effective advocates, helping them own their voice and their power. "" Texans don't quit. The fear of a challenge has never stopped me from standing up to fight for what is right. It's never stopped you either. Our families and future generations are counting on us. When I look at my beautiful grandchildren, Ellis and Sawyer, I wonder: who will tell their stories? Who will fight for them? I know you feel the same way when you look at your children and grandchildren. I'm running for Congress to give voice to the millions of Americans who have been ignored, whose stories aren't being told. Whose voices aren't being heard. "" I'm counting on you, because I know I can. Much love, Wendy | | | "" P.S. -- This campaign is going to be powered by grassroots supporters like you. "" and if you haven't already, can stay up to date with the latest in our campaign by liking our page on "" and by following us on "" and "" | "" | If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | "" Wendy Davis for Congress 3112 Windsor Rd. Ste A #525 Austin, TX 78703 mailto:info@wendydavisforcongress.com "" ""

Friend,

Since day one of his presidency, Democrats have been hell-bent on removing President Trump from office – **_by any means necessary_**.

And with the Left’s SCAM impeachment hearings set to begin tomorrow I’ve informed my team to launch a **Pre-Impeachment Hearing Poll** so your voice can be heard on this matter. **[This poll will ONLY remain open for 24 hours and all responses will remain confidential, but I need your answers today!](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=71fa87f46ba849b2962810ca6f7dbd5a&_e=o25bIYJZxXgjnfr0-Q-zhyGCNghEqlHA2Vp1UmRZycyXXfppUhSJ4Kg8j6fhM6aTgz8aO_5iVeAcm9fxg6FV5mWRV9Iso8d1CE8d2Bnz2SbIQhfbBmdtihdvx4SMy_33d3aGyrSEeZpx8qs284VlHyG69-1zhkjNY8JCWe-EA9mUFgxoMTdfKD15D7zjQVsEcX0jZcxeZmQu4B0yAkABXLWaN3rjih8jjWq2iNhS3dqr9VAYJS7lqFvVmmyr3sYu6rqxI6ddoalebuiIBHh87xSEaV5-ntq69ObHwGp0-AfPN_ZGF08SOZxJ92Nj99bCX-MG5sTsNPKBEXDhpX3McoJZFkUxI_X4Gu-B8GQhOYuqw4zOdDyrN1Pc2ozdEWB2JdoO8P-aaNe-K_8gKHIyb9CtrbEuRiNpe2ehqU79mJVQSNOE0L6-pu627H2gHWxd)**
[**START SURVEY »**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=71fa87f46ba849b2962810ca6f7dbd5a&_e=o25bIYJZxXgjnfr0-Q-zhyGCNghEqlHA2Vp1UmRZycyXXfppUhSJ4Kg8j6fhM6aTgz8aO_5iVeAcm9fxg6FV5mWRV9Iso8d1CE8d2Bnz2SbIQhfbBmdtihdvx4SMy_33d3aGyrSEeZpx8qs284VlHyG69-1zhkjNY8JCWe-EA9mUFgxoMTdfKD15D7zjQVsEcX0jZcxeZmQu4B0yAkABXLWaN3rjih8jjWq2iNhS3dqNXuCjyjRWZ4jIMn7AD00NRM6nw44Eqj8yTyz7Itr85YRAvQTmBN4ulWuXdiJVDkQ3Crpn9ncWVLCre4DnaKJdr8DhIKuvtDDY0-J8dRA99JKfr7i7aI-AW5rddKiW-k9NuIC_qIK5HH9ibQD4BgIens38w-OTat2QWUmFZps2Ze6rjWnDBOAT3vW-jLpl9nvPHHqgqwLr1Ww4ZiLi55DZ)
Democrats already tried removing President Trump from office once before – with their **failed** _Russia Witch Hunt Investigation_.

But after two year and millions of wasted tax payer dollars – President Trump was completely exonerated of ANY wrongdoing.

Tomorrow’s circus **won’t be an impeachment hearing** , it will be a calculated attack on President Trump and America First, in the hopes it will help Democrats steal the 2020 election out from under us.

As you might know by now, I’m a proud supporter of President Trump and been a victim myself of a _Witch Hunt_ just like this. My **Pre-Impeachment Hearing Poll** is critical to our goal of drowning out the Fake News media’s spin on what happens tomorrow and keeping America Great. **[I need to hear from you today!](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=71fa87f46ba849b2962810ca6f7dbd5a&_e=o25bIYJZxXgjnfr0-Q-zhyGCNghEqlHA2Vp1UmRZycyXXfppUhSJ4Kg8j6fhM6aTgz8aO_5iVeAcm9fxg6FV5mWRV9Iso8d1CE8d2Bnz2SbIQhfbBmdtihdvx4SMy_33d3aGyrSEeZpx8qs284VlHyG69-1zhkjNY8JCWe-EA9mUFgxoMTdfKD15D7zjQVsEcX0jZcxeZmQu4B0yAkABXLWaN3rjih8jjWq2iNhS3dql5Vrd2EZwOFjWkTRZSKPNFi04qGlqRmHfLg4j58VVExr2lmK1RZu8ScYUmXKQ5VE8dr8k0UCWF6zhHIeXLo7FZPuFNZvz4-oyQAINWdg_npbsQhWSw10bBweuxhQik_GszZha11A6g9E0yo0wUHSLR1Xz0_ULNCAJm3FwAolhmuWXhY4rSAlQqHP_ahAC-2Btrs--8U9f1Fy6hxLVTvlc)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

name: Megan West
subject: Homosexuality - Can Christians stand for truth and grace?
body:
| | A gay man’s incredible story of redemption
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k2wxXnVDqQGvun8JIJ3Ywjk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=1)
| The culture’s affirmation, advancement, and celebration of homosexuality is growing at a rapid pace. This is not a topic committed Christ-followers can avoid, and many of us have had to ask the question, “What is the best way, as a Christian, to engage with someone who is gay? We recently [had a captivating conversation with Becket Cook](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k2wxXnVDqQGvun8JIJ3Ywjk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=2), author of _A Change of Affection: A Gay Man’s Incredible Story of Redemption,_ in Southern California. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k2wxXnVDqQGvun8JIJ3Ywjk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=3) Becket’s story is filled with all the fascinations of Hollywood and worldly success. But his dramatic conversion and radical transformation from celebrating his gay identity to worshiping the King of the Universe goes against everything we hear in the homosexual narrative today. We not only wanted to share with you his amazing testimony, but we also hope you glean insights on how Christians can best approach the topic of homosexuality in our culture today. | | _“I lived that life for 20 years, and I can tell you... it can be a very dark world.”_ Becket Cook
---|---
_“I lived that life for 20 years, and I can tell you... it can be a very dark world.” - Becket Cook_
As someone who lived a gay lifestyle, apart from God, and is now redeemed, choosing to live a life set apart for the Kingdom, there is no one better than Becket to help us navigate this critical topic.
| _“We’re living in a very specific place and time in culture. And ten years ago, 20 years ago, 40 years ago, this wouldn’t even be an issue, but because the culture is so powerful, even Christians in the church are caving into this. And just like Shadrach Meshach and Abednego, we have to stand firm on our convictions on this issue.”_
---|---
You will be challenged and encouraged as you hear Becket’s story and see his passion for the truth of the Gospel message proclaimed.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k2wxXnVDqQGvun8JIJ3Ywjk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**
Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=5)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=a9iALcJu4bwETeHsLBwLmBsDeFmxSwGzTZHbsTiQwVE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=6)
After watching our interview, [order Becket Cook's book, _A Change of Affection_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=a9iALcJu4bwETeHsLBwLmBsDeFmxSwGzTZHbsTiQwVE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=7), and read the full story of his redemption.
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=8).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191112com01&n=11)

name: Margaret Good
subject: Paris Climate Agreement
body:
Join me, and add your name right now to support the Paris Climate Agreement https://margaretgood.com [https://margaretgood.com]
Team,
The President’s administration announced last week that the US would formally begin the process of withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement. In the face of rising seas and catastrophic storms, this could not be farther from what the United States should be doing.
Climate change is one of the greatest threats of our time — and it has devastating effects on the ecosystems and economies of coastal areas — like those here in Florida’s 16th district. We can see the effects of climate change in everything from Red Tide to the devastation from Hurricane Michael — and pulling out of the Paris Agreement is not the way to combat this.
That’s why I need you on this, team . Join me, and add your name right now to support the Paris Climate Agreement → [http://www.paction.us/parisclimate/margaret-good-for-congress]
ADD YOUR NAME » [https://www.paction.us/parisclimate/margaret-good-for-congress]
I’m running for Congress because I believe that we all have a duty to our communities to work to make them better than we found them. And I firmly believe that we need to be doing more to combat climate change which threatens our economy and our way of life.
Join me, and add your name to support the Paris Climate Agreement and stand for common-sense solutions to the climate crisis → [http://www.paction.us/parisclimate/margaret-good-for-congress]
Thanks,
Margaret

name: Team Yang
subject: Let’s shock the world, Yang Gang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Watch this video to know what’s at stake

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6) **$422,995 to go to hit $1 million

[Watch Andrew’s video and pitch in:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16600?t=5&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6)** [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16600?t=10&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6) | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16600?t=9&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6)
---
Yang Gang --

For this entire campaign, we’ve done everything on a shoestring budget. But thanks to the Yang Gang helping us raise $10 million last quarter, we now have the resources needed to outperform the field and shock the world.

Our first step was to place seven figures behind a statewide ad in Iowa, which is getting rave reviews.

**[Now, we’re planning to double our investment and extend the ad by one week. To do that, we need to hit our goal of raising $1 million by tomorrow night -- and we’re still $422,995 behind. Can you pitch in and help us close the gap?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16600?t=8&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6)**
[Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16600?t=7&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6)
---
The Yang Gang has been the lifeblood of this campaign. With the field narrowing and the focus getting more intense, we’re going to have to lean on you more and more.

We appreciate every one of you, and we’re inspired by the work you do every day to help Andrew fight for a better future.

Let’s keep up the momentum, Yang Gang!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16600?t=6&akid=3001%2E377263%2E8tH-y6)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: DACA's future is before the Supreme Court today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program is before the Supreme Court today, as lower courts have blocked Trump's 2017 decision to end this program and destroy communities. Now, Trump's two appointed justices, Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, could hold the swing votes that determine the future of DACA recipients. Nearly a million people have relied on this program, allowing them to seek employment, to work, and to contribute tax dollars as active members of our communities. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We're asking voters what their thoughts are so we can understand where you stand on this critical issue: **Do you support DACA?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc05/6e9863e8/1657f827/1db09b54/741445319/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-6MCAhio") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc05/6e9863e8/1657f827/1db09b54/741445319/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-6MCAhio") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc05/6e9863e8/1657f827/1db09b5b/741445319/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191112a.ND-b&refcode2=InpPANGGRzKc70qqhw8r")

| **The threshold:** To qualify for the December debate, each candidate must have 200,000 individual donors and hit 4% in at least four polls. **The numbers:** Right now, we're less than 15,000 short of the individual donor requirement, and we haven't gotten the polls we need yet. **The plan:** Our campaign launched our brand new _Ground Game Fund_ to help us raise Cory's profile and introduce him to more caucus-goers and voters in the early states. This will help us both grow our grassroots support and rise in the polls, because we know that the more people hear from Cory, the more they like him. **The ask:** We need to raise $550,000 by 11:59 p.m. on November 15th to fully fund our plan to get Cory on the December debate stage, and we need you to step up today to do it. **Can we count on you to chip in $5 right now to become a Ground Game donor of this campaign?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191112_BHQ_20191112-fr-BHQ-debate-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20.20,50,100")

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: National Run For Office Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_cxITsopv0sJp2BjwkHfF6HogZRzgmylTMWHTWPVyL4=/sW3FwN6sjFBjsoWNuPpEgu-T7zEDSQyYKC_teRJl4ow=)

Today is #NationalRunForOfficeDay and I could not be more proud to be running for PA Auditor General.To learn more about me check out my website [ninaforpa.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/_cxITsopv0sJp2BjwkHfF6HogZRzgmylTMWHTWPVyL4=/gJkzLcE6hO919iE58e4r_1wq51fWkOFnYBOLqfO71Hc=)

Donate

Here is an online link: [https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3753951775916231680](https://act.myngp.com/el/_cxITsopv0sJp2BjwkHfF6HogZRzgmylTMWHTWPVyL4=/sW3FwN6sjFBjsoWNuPpEgu-T7zEDSQyYKC_teRJl4ow=)

Checks may be made out to Nina for PA and mailed to:

Nina for PA
P.O. Box 40681
Philadelphia, PA 19107

Please note, there are no contribution limits for this race. The Primary Election is on April 28, 2020. As an early investor, you will help build this campaign and help me start strong. Thank you for your consideration!

Why I'm Running

I am running to restore two things in short supply in Pennsylvania: Accountability and transparency. I hope I can count on your support as I strive to bring my progressive vision to Pennsylvania as the Auditor General and restore trust in government.

Pennsylvania does not have a single woman, a single New American, or a single scientist currently serving in a statewide row office. Pennsylvania has never been represented by a person of color or a progressive in a Statewide Row office. Representation matters! As auditor general, I'll use my office to shine a bright light on sexual harassment in government, I'll take on Big Pharma to lower costs on life saving medicines and end the flow of opioids into our communities, and I will use the power of the auditor general's office to give lawmakers the data and the resources they need to call out the NRA and finally pass effective gun safety legislation.

If we want new faces in government, then we need a new progressive voice!

Donate

Here is an online link: [https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3753951775916231680](https://act.myngp.com/el/_cxITsopv0sJp2BjwkHfF6HogZRzgmylTMWHTWPVyL4=/sW3FwN6sjFBjsoWNuPpEgu-T7zEDSQyYKC_teRJl4ow=)

Checks may be made out to Nina for PA and mailed to:

Nina for PA
P.O. Box 40681
Philadelphia, PA 19107

Please note, there are no contribution limits for this race. The Primary Election is on April 28, 2020. As an early investor, you will help build this campaign and help me start strong. Thank you for your consideration!

Paid for by Nina for PA

Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

name: Kim Mangone
subject: McCarthy's latest threats to impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Kim Mangone for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Kevin McCarthy is doing everything he can to stop the impeachment inquiry, and his latest move is terrible news for the American people. He said last week that he is “going to make adjustments to [the House Intelligence] committee,” threatening to reassign Rep. Jim Jordan to the committee. Last Friday, he did just that. Jim Jordan is one of the president’s strongest allies in Congress, and his being on the committee is a serious threat to our ever finding out the truth about the president’s corruption. [**If you think McCarthy represents the worst of the GOP. If you think he has to be sent the message that, as long as he’s in Congress, he will never put the country above his party. If you believe our country deserves better leadership. Please, click here and donate now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11795366/120531821/-840655752?refcode=KMA20191112&refcode2=H3YBSphaFocsVajqTjgB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjJkMGEyZi04YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V1dMwysiExuqKaW2X76QCJCvLZDZjmN5ADHxnzoEaeQ=) It’s not just impeachment. name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, this guy did more for rural Iowa in 16 hours than Steve King has done in 16 years:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hi Peter --

Traveling to small towns on Sioux City Sue, I've been hearing from person after person in Iowa's 4th: rural communities are being left behind by politicians in Washington.

We need a renewed commitment to our rural communities and concrete investments that will create good-paying jobs to get our economy back on track.

That's why I'm excited about the work that Rep. Ro Khanna, whose district includes part of Silicon Valley, is doing in Congress to advocate for tech companies to invest right here in Iowa. As he said:

_"The digital revolution is one that every community should and can participate in."_

**[If you believe we need innovative policies so all communities can share in the prosperity of America's tech economy, please add your name to Rep. Ro Khanna's petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11795370/120531854/-1011600623?source=em19_20191112_JDScholten4Ro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJkMGEyZi04YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6vLL8wjCGxU7HvzRM-nUu1iSdc2FNVpc5pi9PS6bRg=&emci=8291ef1c-0904-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9e2d0a2f-8b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11795371/120531855/-1011600623?source=em19_20191112_JDScholten4Ro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJkMGEyZi04YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6vLL8wjCGxU7HvzRM-nUu1iSdc2FNVpc5pi9PS6bRg=&emci=8291ef1c-0904-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9e2d0a2f-8b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
Ro believes in rural America. He even convinced technology leaders from Microsoft, LinkedIn, Ripple, and others (including me!) to join him in Iowa at Jefferson's History Boy Theatre to learn more about efforts to bring good tech jobs to rural communities.

Rather than leave rural communities behind and outsource tech jobs to India and China, Ro believes companies should invest in our people and our infrastructure here.

He's also helped bring a tech training center and software company office space to Jefferson called The Forge, to connect Iowans with educators and remote internships in Silicon Valley.

As the _Carroll Times Herald_ said, "It's possible Ro Khanna did more for Greene County, Iowa, in 16 hours on a past weekend than Steve King has in 16 years."

**[I agree — and that's why I'm urging you to support Rep. Ro Khanna's efforts to create Silicon Prairie so all Americans can share in the prosperity of our innovation economy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11795372/120531856/-1011600623?source=em19_20191112_JDScholten4Ro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJkMGEyZi04YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6vLL8wjCGxU7HvzRM-nUu1iSdc2FNVpc5pi9PS6bRg=&emci=8291ef1c-0904-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9e2d0a2f-8b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11795373/120531857/-1011600623?source=em19_20191112_JDScholten4Ro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTJkMGEyZi04YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6vLL8wjCGxU7HvzRM-nUu1iSdc2FNVpc5pi9PS6bRg=&emci=8291ef1c-0904-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9e2d0a2f-8b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
Thank you,

-J.D. Scholten

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc817/3eb3e2fc/56fd86e2/744d9d6d/317998509/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Delivers a Salute to Veterans at Historic NYC Parade
body:
"President Donald Trump paid tribute Monday to all Americans who have worn a military uniform, from the Revolution through present-day conflicts." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84835156b6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Delivers a Salute to Veterans at Historic NYC Parade**

“President Donald Trump paid tribute Monday to all Americans who have worn a military uniform, from the Revolution through present-day conflicts. He spoke at the start of the annual New York City Veterans Day parade,” Richard Sisk reports for Military.com.

President Trump became the first sitting U.S. President to attend the parade. “Our veterans risked everything for us. Now, it is our duty to serve and protect them,” he said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30c7572baf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The House impeachment effort is a brazen attempt to protect the ‘independence’ of the permanent bureaucracy. It’s bureaucracy versus democracy, and the ironically named Democratic Party has gone to the mattresses to oppose the threat that elections pose to permanent bureaucratic power,” Adam Mill writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87233449d5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “While Democrats pursue their partisan crusade to impeach President Trump, their own constituents continue to benefit from his policies in the form of new jobs and better wages, reduced income inequality, a more equitable criminal justice system, and — at long last — real progress toward curbing the opioid crisis . . . But don’t expect to hear about these bipartisan achievements from the anti-Trump media,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41d6268226&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump was “overwhelmingly cheered by the crowd at the Alabama Crimson Tide vs LSU game” Saturday afternoon in Tuscaloosa. During the game’s first timeout, the President and First Lady Melania Trump “were shown in the stadium’s four video screens and prolonged applause began, followed by scattered chants of ‘USA! USA! USA!’ Trump smiled and waved to the crowd,” Paul Gattis reports for [AL.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e56066e34&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Border mayors from Brownsville to San Diego have signed on to resolutions in support of the U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade agreement,” saying that USMCA must be ratified quickly by Congress to modernize NAFTA, Luis Montoya reports for the [_Rio Grande Guardian_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f76ae1397b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5c0b986b3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a57b934523&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1f011cb920)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Corky Messner
subject: A “Kangaroo Court” on Capitol Hill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Have you read my opinion piece? Tap or click to read!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c421ac2f5c315922/1a83ec73000fbed5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

I’m sick and tired of the Democrats abusing Americans’ time (and tax dollars!) with this unconstitutional impeachment attack on our President.
It’s time everyone knows just where I stand, and**[I lay it all on the line in my most recent opinion piece. Just click or tap here to read it](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c421ac2f5c315922/61e577f3e3ac6c51c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

When our Founding Fathers created the Constitution, one of the things they wanted to make certain was that all Americans were treated fairly. Our judicial system was created around due process. **Instead of a fair trial, what we’ve seen so far looks more like a Kangaroo Court.**
I’ve called on Speaker Pelosi and Chairman Schiff to cut the nonsense, to consider the long-term consequences of their unfair process and to end this closed-door circus. We need get back to work.
Read more **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c421ac2f5c315922/1df203bf63cc2266c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
\- Corky [ **CLICK: Support my campaign >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c421ac2f5c315922/c82ab96a6042dc5ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c421ac2f5c315922/7f59987d62ee79a1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c421ac2f5c315922/49d0b38d860f0ff5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

[_**America is running out of time!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEwOTM1ODIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTA2MzYyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff continue to stifle our country's growth by running an out of control, closed door impeachment process. If we do not get Congress back on track, America will be put on an irreversible path that will harm American democracy as we know it.

Frank,

body:
Sharing these kinds of conversations with grassroots supporters is incredibly important to Elizabeth. They've grown our grassroots movement (one selfie at a time)... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285288e6/45c30650/10440dbc5/66f44518/3303659543/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Before Elizabeth takes the debate stage next week, you won't see her hosting any fancy private luncheons or rubbing elbows with mega donors at closed-door fundraisers.

She'll be in New Hampshire and Iowa, talking with people in their communities about the issues that matter to them.

Sharing these kinds of conversations with grassroots supporters is incredibly important to Elizabeth. They've grown our grassroots movement (one selfie at a time) and even inspired some of Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change.

And even though she can't sit down with every supporter (she wishes she could!) we wanted to give you an opportunity to tell her what's on your mind, too.

**[What issues matter to you in this race? Please fill out this quick survey to let Elizabeth know what's on your mind.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285288e6/45c30650/10440dbc5/66f4451b/3303659543/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw0OVBfU1VSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkxMTEyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EML49P_SUR_ISS_Q_20191112_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

This campaign isn't just about Elizabeth's vision. It's about the hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you. It's about the issues that you think about, and the dreams that you're fighting for.

Elizabeth wants to put the issues this team cares about front-and-center in this campaign -- but we can't do that without your help.

**[Click here to take the two-minute survey to share your priorities and let Elizabeth know why you're in this fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285288e6/45c30650/10440dbc5/66f4451b/3303659543/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw0OVBfU1VSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkxMTEyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EML49P_SUR_ISS_Q_20191112_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Team Warren

body:
$27.56.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f06/4bef7a87/6be2f300/287fcc60/1426068992/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**$27.56.**
That's how much our average online donation was last quarter.
We're proud of that fact -- but Susan Collins is relying almost exclusively on very large donations from special interest groups, so her average donation is much much larger than ours. We need to generate a LOT of contributions to make up the difference.
**[So please, chip in any amount right now to help us hit 100,000 online contributions. We're so close to our goal -- help push us over the finish line.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f06/4bef7a87/6be2f300/287fcc67/1426068992/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191112-full")**
Susan Collins can just reach out to her wealthy special interest friends when she needs help with fundraising - but Sara is rejecting all corporate PAC money and running a campaign powered by your small-dollar donations.
That's just who we are. So if you keep fighting, we're going to win.
All our best,
Team Gideon
