name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: He has abused the power we placed in his hands.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390950/55b66746/2cf2a022/80f2617/1164700225/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Impeachment. In the 231 years since our Constitution was ratified, the House of Representatives has only impeached two presidents, neither convicted. By resigning, Richard Nixon escaped the verdict of the House and Senate but did not escape the verdict of history. **We're at a pivotal moment in history again.** Impeachment is a solemn process, one that we do not undertake lightly. As the evidence mounts, as the truth is revealed, it is more clear every day that Congress has a duty to act. The President may claim his interactions with Ukraine were "perfect", but his actions tell the tale. By desperately trying to cover it up, lie about it, and withhold evidence about it, Donald Trump reveals that he knew his actions were wrong. He has lied. He has corrupted. He has obstructed. He put his own personal interests above our national security. He abused the power we placed in his hands. If we fail to hold him to account, we fail the American people and the democratic republic we have built together. I've taken an oath to defend our Constitution. I will keep that oath. That's why I voted to start the formal impeachment process in the House. I do not celebrate that vote. But I am resolute. The American people deserve a president, now and forever, who puts their interests above his own. _Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390950/55b66746/2cf2a022/80f2610/1164700225/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-12-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390950/55b66746/2cf2a022/80f2611/1164700225/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-12-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390950/55b66746/2cf2a022/80f2612/1164700225/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-12-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390950/55b66746/2cf2a022/80f2613/1164700225/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-12-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons")
---|---|---|---

---|---

If we fail to hold him to account, we fail the American people and the democratic republic we have built together. I've taken an oath to defend our Constitution. I will keep that oath. That's why I voted to start the formal impeachment process in the House. I do not celebrate that vote. But I am resolute. The American people deserve a president, now and forever, who puts their interests above his own. name: Karl
subject: My mom can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | Peter, Last Tuesday's elections show that my mom, Betsy Rader, can flip the open seat in Ohio State Senate District 18 next November. Her district includes suburban areas like the ones we see flipping around the country; it includes Dem-leaning areas like Kent and Ravenna; and my mom's got loads of name-recognition and goodwill from her hard-fought 2018 Congressional race. We can do it but she needs [_your help_!](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBChgWzF3inYFV66VGI4x86_TDcRPPgLWhViIncT_tQ=/paPj1LyR9GWbR4bpOWzlpb2PTN3ZMNuvNdQ8EJ5m3Lg=?refcode=karlnovember) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBChgWzF3inYFV66VGI4x86_TDcRPPgLWhViIncT_tQ=/paPj1LyR9GWbR4bpOWzlpb2PTN3ZMNuvNdQ8EJ5m3Lg=?refcode=karlnovember) Like Kentucky, Ohio has to stay in the fight. After voting for Trump by 30 points, Kentuckians elected a Democratic Governor, partly because of the Republican incumbent's opposition to the Medicaid expansion. **Similarly, in District 18, my mom 's Republican opponent opposed the Medicaid expansion.** _Not only does my mom support the Medicaid expansion, but she walks the walk - she worked at Medicare and Medicaid to help implement the Affordable Care Act, and is continually advocating for everyone's right to affordable healthcare._ Due to gerrymandering, Ohio doesn't have very many competitive races so the Republicans can pour their money into my mom's race. Your grassroots support would go a long way to helping her run a strong race, and would continue the trend we're seeing in places like Virginia and Kentucky. As her son and one of her biggest supporters, I know she can't do it without you. **Many thanks,** **Karl** **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VBChgWzF3inYFV66VGI4x86_TDcRPPgLWhViIncT_tQ=/HzoTaTvOmp9iBDaqUFCPMW6BN0bXaY1XIu83AMfz8I8=?refcode=karlnovember)** ****

subject: I am the FrontRunner Who Has Your Back

Dear Supporter,
One week ago today the election outcomes for Virginia and Kentucky showed us that there is a blue wave rising and flowing through the south. This blue wave restores and raises hope in representative politics that promotes inclusion.
As the Frontrunner- our campaign was tagged as the "The Hope of the South" by US Senator Barbara Boxer, the longest serving woman Senator in US history.

As the Frontrunner- I am the only candidate beating Thom Tillis by the widest margins in every poll conducted since this run for US Senate began.

As the Frontrunner- I am the only candidate from a background of work not wealth. I am the only one who has experience at every level of political, party, and professional leadership.

I am the Frontrunner who has done the most policy work promoting economic expansion, job creation, affordable housing, clean air and water, wage increases, gender equality, education equity and equitable healthcare for North Carolinians.

I am the Frontrunner who has your back. Who wrestles with making ends meet; Who fights so that all of US can have access to training, employment, housing and food; for ALL to have access to the American Dream, even DACA recipients; Who fights for an America that works for the ones who make America work everyday!

I am the Frontrunner who has your back and I need your help sharing this message across the state. name: Christina Finello
subject: We need to lower prescription drug costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, When I hear stories of Americans dying because they couldn’t afford the cost of life-saving prescription drugs, it breaks my heart. We have to get health care costs in check \-- the cost of necessary medicine should not leave families in financial ruin. No one should have to skip or ration their prescription and be left to suffer with serious and sometimes fatal health issues. In September, Democrats introduced H.R. 3, the Lower Drug Costs Now Act of 2019, in the House. This bill will repeal a measure that prevents Medicare from directly negotiating with drug companies to lower costs and make the results available to every American. H.R. 3 also puts a limit on out-of-pocket costs. But corporate greed is standing in the way of passing this bill because so many GOP representatives, including my opponent, take money from the pharmaceutical companies that set the price on drugs to fuel their campaigns. [**Today, I’m calling on Congress to pass H.R. 3 because we cannot wait any longer when families are struggling. If you agree that we need to lower the costs of prescription drugs, then add your name with mine now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11797799/120562135/-1227484161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWRkOWFmNy05YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYcKDqQe0ZQ7TmMZmeJv591lDKffRqX0ELOLy047_XI=&emci=ea868994-4b02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f9dd9af7-9b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10163004) Thanks for standing with me, Christina | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11797800/120562136/-1227484161?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWRkOWFmNy05YjA1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYcKDqQe0ZQ7TmMZmeJv591lDKffRqX0ELOLy047_XI=&emci=ea868994-4b02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=f9dd9af7-9b05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10163004)**

name: Ed Markey
subject: Trump must not sacrifice our families and our future for Big Oil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| [_**SIGN ON: Tell Donald Trump to stop attacking auto emission standards!**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df6d/693b8b0a/43e83ab7/72de6672/1843017327/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
Team,

When President Obama used my legislation to raise emission standards to 55.5/mpg by 2025, we were on a course to drastically reduce the harmful emissions from automobiles.

But now, President Trump is rolling back that law. Under Big Oil's agenda, Trump and Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell are doing everything they can to undermine our progress to combat the climate crisis.

We should be increasing emission standards, not lowering them to help corporate polluters' bottom line.

_**[That's why Democrats across the country are taking a stand to say STOP the rollbacks on auto emission standards. Will you join me and sign our petition today and make your voice heard?](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df6d/693b8b0a/43e83ab7/72de6672/1843017327/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df6d/693b8b0a/43e83ab7/72de6672/1843017327/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
Rolling back vehicle emission standards will cause a severe increase in carbon emissions in our atmosphere, which will:

* Accelerate the climate crisis;
* Increase the risk of chronic illness, such as cardiovascular disease and mental health disorders among vulnerable populations, primarily young kids and communities of color;
* Introduce more pollutants and carcinogens to the air we breathe;
* Undermine the fuel economy standard, costing consumers billions of dollars.

The federal government should not be sacrificing our families and our future to protect corporate polluters and Big Oil.

_**[Take a stand and sign our petition today to tell Donald Trump to stop the rollbacks of emission standards!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df6d/693b8b0a/43e83ab7/72de6672/1843017327/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df6d/693b8b0a/43e83ab7/72de6672/1843017327/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/markey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
Thanks,

Ed

Friend,

Democrats had resounding victories in last week's election - victories in states that have been, historically, Republican strongholds.

Now, looking to build off that momentum Democrats are gearing up not just to defeat President Trump in 2020 but also target and defeat Republican Senators they deem, _most vulnerable. Friend, we're on their list of targets_.

The Radical Left has already teamed up with big-pocketed, outside spending groups and are dumping _**millions**_ of dollars into flipping the U.S. Senate BLUE.

**[Our seat is being targeted and I need to know we have your support today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1441ee8339e24ecb96e275df45754718&_e=SrAZbHOS1myRKxPl4lvIG-BLIKnOO9RZAaGgXK7TLCQ3rMSNkHgYKaRJxp44mHmYU7SDMkPVUoxo3bSnf_iOSb9JUJkXqE58h3p9UGBv2dqL4oUAii9jvJ43C4cNzWsZf_eTH6oUEiIgRoyzwckgoe4JPLU8_cNETZzPpuwbMOYHQQjvniM_JoGHC_lH3MRFO7xXTkQHyUCoodBXdcN_Atc0SdsxKBe1ThNCMWgc9RrQEeX_kAuq2Rlnq-IkbXdaplfNnBs9iYIWzKHDVmcOeGNWqtxUJoHVkDLqkh379TtlW_mbEjPLeflZcLrnwOEAZ0dzdUGywoGsjSN74g8PAF7wFXUgITc4eEQnewtCcBBtWVKdFr6pycgkNqhS1jMpGmDc9V7RAT1agwKVLCfzmQ%3D%3D)**

| [ **« Support Republicans Holding the
Senate Majority »**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1441ee8339e24ecb96e275df45754718&_e=SrAZbHOS1myRKxPl4lvIG-BLIKnOO9RZAaGgXK7TLCQ3rMSNkHgYKaRJxp44mHmYU7SDMkPVUoxo3bSnf_iOSb9JUJkXqE58h3p9UGBv2dqL4oUAii9jvJ43C4cNzWsZf_eTH6oUEiIgRoyzwckgobNGhrNNCdK1fJ4dTzzyfLpjue0OQV6AczHdmy5-SJXRoxEzMlgGMPOuVY6E7_LPPg6qJJ8Id7VyVmEcFgsWv6aWtSgom5kTHoLJt80xPN1xfvvYf6Yo2dxAm6us5Cmcn-CrIwlMP3Rntid9W7FNGiz3y4t7Ar2Jo5b37J-cTqgVyiF3hZJLeOkGNS1utY8HV0X_sTKXF_2Q8WrQPY89tUuh9oERaOIqLua8DLY72adm)
---

These “dark money” organizations targeting Republican senators are looking to deliver a catastrophic blow to our America First movement.

If we have any chance at defeating the Blue Wave Democrats are gearing up for in 2020, **[we must fight back immediately.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1441ee8339e24ecb96e275df45754718&_e=SrAZbHOS1myRKxPl4lvIG-BLIKnOO9RZAaGgXK7TLCQ3rMSNkHgYKaRJxp44mHmYU7SDMkPVUoxo3bSnf_iOSb9JUJkXqE58h3p9UGBv2dqL4oUAii9jvJ43C4cNzWsZf_eTH6oUEiIgRoyzwckgoe4JPLU8_cNETZzPpuwbMOYHQQjvniM_JoGHC_lH3MRFnvqtqRivY2emgTt6ArQT2HqMj5p6OGwj0CgvoFI9_Vyfy2aHFKA2wXdJ0-E8WiM988xcHYV6Yjtc2VVnLZYMBfpN1HjIAedsl7eiOGVruvCaYo7cmAyv01tJgeyNqp_gbvy80podUADtW38XE1Wy6hnMXhVr5IndiWQ4zObJjWPn5NxpbAsC413APUQEz7SrWPiuTfZc3ZWFT8nkcVyeHg%3D%3D)**

You know where we stand: A strong Second Amendment, securing our borders, strengthening our military and caring for veterans, and ensuring a prosperous future for the next generation.

It's hard to believe but this message has made our seat right here in Montana a top _target_ of the Radical Left and **[we need to know right now that you're in our corner today.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1441ee8339e24ecb96e275df45754718&_e=SrAZbHOS1myRKxPl4lvIG-BLIKnOO9RZAaGgXK7TLCQ3rMSNkHgYKaRJxp44mHmYU7SDMkPVUoxo3bSnf_iOSb9JUJkXqE58h3p9UGBv2dqL4oUAii9jvJ43C4cNzWsZf_eTH6oUEiIgRoyzwckgobNGhrNNCdK1fJ4dTzzyfLowpGYx-8COE2iiJO-3Mg0c8QwoQMaP1nT-1vlBWQwuNdWbXxPeEVR-3_rQQhlXFuyiOmcq0WAafGVLRspg35tMOTEckBedjpHmmX-xwf6dLPP0lAhk1cUpyMnq1zkgPxazmFH7bRQ_8b0FqQxBT165qVMWL40QuIzRK-hDtXQAa2TkpgMLy8yH_XE2_HHeG2HdknGtvhMehUoO-p4B0fJF)**

Senator Steve Daines

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=1441ee8339e24ecb96e275df45754718&_e=SrAZbHOS1myRKxPl4lvIG-BLIKnOO9RZAaGgXK7TLCQ3rMSNkHgYKaRJxp44mHmYU7SDMkPVUoxo3bSnf_iOSfFYaxa_UG0NNtpsVbRCgtVasZBy7_NKHzDxrO4_VgDQoyAOgf7lioRPjdI1JeDxrlfITmuejOa5RbC4EIn5BhEmSguXPD_cgT-XO3w3RdIAK0aF7Pppua-iUZIULGkpFQF3g4L6GOuhanleACAaFTvCdXkiyFNkOS1wvM8ULbhcakRA1fnrAad3eIZDCmj84IpVzBw3USsotxtNHd6mhtJadO-XtNk6aXUa6FeTzCx29sofseBg-jRAc_XoTkBQ4nu25BTt20MYKiOjT01X89n85fdpIw5CDdcrCAo_dq3D)

name: Shannon Salk, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Before I sit down with John to go through your responses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I want to make sure you had a chance to share your thoughts. It won't take more than a minute! | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd3d/3704413145/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, I'm about to sit down with John and the team to go over the responses to our strategy survey, and I want to make sure you had a chance to share your thoughts. It won't take more than a minute!

It's true--John really does listen as much as he talks. Your priorities, concerns, and stories really are important to him and our campaign strategy.

[**_Can you quickly fill out our survey? We want to know what 's most important to you in this race._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd3a/3704413145/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/let-john-know-what-s-on-your-mind?source=em_surv_20191112_SS_20191112-surv-SS-priorities-2mo_2mo&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&zip=18326")

Together, we will replace Cory Gardner--and his voting record that's in lockstep with Donald Trump 98% of the time--with an independent voice who will bring people together and get Washington working for us.

Thank you for your time,

Shannon

Shannon Salk
National Finance Director
Hickenlooper for Colorado [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_surv_20191112_SS_20191112-surv-SS-priorities-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: John Hickenlooper
Date: Thu, Nov 7, 2019
Subject: [SURVEY] What's on your mind? Team--traveling the state, I hear so many reasons why Coloradans want new leadership in Washington. From the start, I've built my public service on listening as much as I talk.

I intend to put Colorado's priorities first in the United States Senate--and one of the ways you can help me do that is to share what's most important to you in this race.

[**_Will you take this quick survey to let me know what 's on your mind for this campaign? Your input helps shape our campaign strategy._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd3a/3704413145/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/let-john-know-what-s-on-your-mind?source=em_surv_20191112_SS_20191112-surv-SS-priorities-2mo_2mo&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&zip=18326")

Tuesday's election results in so many parts of the country have me feeling optimistic about our chances next year. If we come together, we can end Mitch McConnell's majority, take back the Senate, and get our priorities back on the table in Washington. I can't wait to read your responses!

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_surv_20191112_SS_20191112-surv-SS-priorities-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd38/3704413145/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd39/3704413145/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd36/3704413145/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd37/3704413145/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd34/3704413145/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd35/3704413145/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771470/691c9bd/6f890f32/11a7fd38/3704413145/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Nate Silver just dropped some troubling news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I know we're still celebrating a great week for Virginia Democrats, but we have some troubling news from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7d8/53d9897e/5221ce0f/1c891b59/3585962068/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191112nd__330__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek, I know we're still celebrating a great week for Virginia Democrats, but we have some _troubling news_ from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.

FiveThirtyEight ran an article analyzing 2020 Senate races and they rated Virginia's partisan lean as only _**D+0.1!**_

**Remember, Mark only won his last race in 2014 by _less than 1%,_ so there's no doubt about it: this WILL be a tough race.

Even though we had a good week, we can't take anything for granted. We have to start preparing now if we're going to carry this momentum into 2020. Can you chip in -- any amount -- today to help send Mark back to the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7d8/53d9897e/5221ce0f/1c891b58/3585962068/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191112nd__330__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**

Since Virginia will be a battleground state in next year's presidential election, the Trump campaign has already begun pouring money into our Commonwealth in an effort to turn it red -- **_and defeat Mark._**

The Trump campaign even located its headquarters in Northern Virginia! That's how much they're investing in simultaneously flipping Virginia and Mark's seat.

Six years ago, when Mark last ran for re-election, polls consistently had him leading Ed Gillespie by double digits. Political experts even rated his race as a **_Likely D_** win.

But when the dust settled, Mark won by **_0.8%, or 17,727 votes._** Virginia is always competitive and 2020 won't be an exception.

**We need to raise enough money before 2019 ends so we can head into 2020 fired up and ready to expand our team, run ads, and knock doors.[How much we're able to raise depends on you. disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hello Peter, Trump and his corporate cronies have taken these past three years to dismantle as many environmental regulations as possible in an effort to help big corporations pollute more and put profits over people. One of his latest rollbacks is removing California's right to set its own vehicle emissions standards \-- rules put in place to limit harmful emissions that California has been leading the country on. These emissions are harmful for so many reasons, namely that they contribute to climate change, worsen air pollution, and cause serious health conditions for children and elderly people. Trump wants to put more of these in the air, simply for the sake of saving a buck and helping out his millionaire friends. [**We won 't stand for this. If you believe that the White House needs to stop harming the environment, destroying a future for our children, and start caring about the American people, please add your name to our petition. We need as many Americans as possible to raise up their voices and push back against this sham of a government.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc01/6e9863e8/1651285d/1db09bb0/1165564752/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/wdtop/") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc01/6e9863e8/1651285d/1db09bb0/1165564752/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/wdtop/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Alert: The anti-Iowan liberal "squad" threatens our success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bobby for Iowa
body:
Socialist Democrats threaten to unravel the gains President Trump has made for Iowans | | | | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=cfb493951b&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=dd34cf49d8&e=90fad69796)
---
|
### Peter,

Liberal socialists Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders spent last weekend touring Iowa, trying to bring their far-left values to our conservative state.

The truth is, Bernie and the so-called Squad's socialism would be disastrous for Iowans and undo all of the gains the middle class has made under President Trump.

These are just some of the consequences that would result from the implementation of the Squad's far-left agenda.
* A Green New Deal, which would raise energy prices for the middle class.
* Socialized medicine, which would cause a massive tax increase and take away your ability to choose your healthcare.
* Federally-funded abortion on demand, which would use your tax dollars to kill the unborn.

None of these are Iowa values, yet the Squad and their preferred presidential candidates keep advocating for them. They think that turning out their far-left base will be enough to win them the House, Senate, and presidency in 2020.

And they may be right.

That's where you come in. Iowa's 2nd Congressional District is a very important pickup opportunity and we need your help.

[**Will you pitch in $5, $25, $50 or even $100 to help us retake this district for conservatives?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=f0bd7df711&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Today](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e004e3637a&e=90fad69796 "Donate Today")
---
| The Democrats already have the House, have a chance of winning the Senate, and are fired up to beat President Trump in 2020. But even if the President wins, which I think he will, he needs to have a Congress that has his back in order to deliver for the American people.

We can't bring back the American Middle Class with this group of radical obstructionists holding Congress hostage. We've got to take back the House -- and the only way to do that is to win Democrat-held seats.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and this race is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. [**And we can't do that unless we match the liberals dollar for dollar in what is going to be a very expensive race. Please contribute $5, $25, $50, $100 or anything you can today.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b8b935f45b&e=90fad69796)

Thanks so much and God bless.

\--Bobby Schilling

name: Mike Franken
subject: An existential threat to Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Iowa possesses two of this nation's most precious rural resources -- a good public education system and world-famous top soil. "That's a strange combination," you may add? Yes, but it is undeniable th
|
---
| |
---

| |
---
Dear friend --
Iowa possesses two of this nation's most precious rural resources -- a good public education system and world-famous topsoil. "That's a strange combination," you may add? Yes, but it is undeniable that through technical creativity and healthy topsoil, Iowa's agricultural production is second-to-none. Is this a 'forever-thing', though? Can Iowa's ag business model be relied upon to keep production steadily increasing? And not cause irreparable harm to soil quality, water purity, etc.? Probably not. Without changing the profit-loss equation... without changing crop tillage and rotation processes... without an ag policy overhaul... our soil quality may be at significant risk. **It 's past time that my generation takes charge of the future, and it can start right here in Iowa. **
A major part of this conversation centers on the environment. The changing climate is now more than just an annoyance -- it's an existential threat. Torrential rains, topsoil erosion, microbiology depredation, weird cold-hot spells... I'm not sure crop subsidies are a viable insurance plan against ag losses from the worst nature can throw at us. Plus, a counterproductive trade policy, combined with exclusions affecting ethanol production is a death knell to the livelihood of many Iowans. **Is the environmental crisis and the broader ag policy the one-two knock-out punch to rural Iowa, and possibly urban Iowa? Let 's not risk it; let's look for alternatives, folks. **
I don't want to witness the extinction of Iowa's owner-operated farms. **Let 's demand change:**
1. Let's make Iowa's ag become simpatico with the environmentalists
2. Let's put the onus of profit-loss on the farmer's skill, versus giving that say-so to industry and government
3. Let's renew our commitment to the preservation of healthy topsoil
4. Let's make Iowa the center of excellence in high tech ag, manufacturing for ag, beneficial ag policy, and environmental compliance and vision.

I implore you: Commit to this course of action and revitalize our state's future.
Next, let's round up helpers. Other ag states, our national infrastructure, international climate agreements, and balanced trade policy will be catalysts to implementing a viable ag and environmental policy agenda. We can do this.
**And no, Mr. President ... do not withdraw from international climate accords.** America needs to continue our leadership role in combating climate change.
I'm ready to lead this fight for Iowa and the country, but I need you to join my campaign. I'll be releasing more of these proposals along the way, and [**I hope you use this link, add your name, and follow along with our progress.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2412/33365068/4a64bbaf/3f8b80ab/1590743662/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/enviropolicy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=1+-+I+hope+you+use+this+link+add+your+name+a&utm_campaign=em_pet_2019.11.12_mf_b1_all&source=em_pet_2019.11.12_mf_b1_all")
Mike Franken, VADM USN (ret)
Candidate for the U.S. Senate

---

[Contribute](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2412/33365068/4a64bbaf/3f8b80a4/1590743662/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=em_pet_2019.11.12_mf_b1_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=2+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=em_pet_2019.11.12_mf_b1_all&source=em_pet_2019.11.12_mf_b1_all")
---

| Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

Chip in a dollar right now to ensure Cory 's spot on the December debate stage.** [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191112_BHQ_20191112-fr-BHQ-$1-ndnrs_ndnrs_contribbutton1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Throughout this campaign, Cory has been a powerful advocate for environmental justice, reproductive freedom, criminal justice reform, closing the racial wealth gap, and so many other important issues that haven't received nearly as much attention as they deserve. **The bottom line is that Cory 's voice needs to continue being heard in this race.** These debate thresholds are a big test for an underdog campaign like ours. Whether we secure Cory's spot on that debate stage depends on whether we step up at this very moment. Let's do this!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20Sloan?=
subject: Stand with UNITE HERE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Support our union siblings as they make demands at Austin City Council | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/83ee16fcbaae/stand-with-unite-here?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=bf498989ec&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | Hey Y’all,

We stand with the working class, and we stand with organized labor. That means strengthening unions and making them more democratic, and today we’re reaching out with an ask from one of our local unions here in Austin.
UNITE HERE is a union representing workers in the hotel, food service, laundry, warehouse, and casino gaming industries, and this week they are calling on folks to support the passage of an Austin City Council resolution regarding Austin Convention Enterprises. **ACE owns Austin’s public hotel, and the resolution ensures financial transparency and public accountability from ACE as****** they run a hotel that belongs to the people of Austin. To lend your support to UNITE HERE’s efforts, please:
* Call council members and let them know you support **Agenda Item 55** on November 14, 2019 using the talking points below;
* Register in support of Agenda Item 55 starting next week at City Hall;
* Write a quick [_email right now to Austin City Council_](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=23a45fad35&e=c169cb0a8e) to let them know you support Agenda Item 55 using the suggested email below.

Workers are the backbone of our society, and when workers lead, society thrives. It is crucial that we mobilize behind union-led efforts, because their fights are our fights. If you need help drafting a message to City Council or want to see more detail about the issue, please read below. Thank you for standing with workers.
In solidarity, Heidi Sloan
_Agenda Item 55 Council Email_ Dear Mayor Adler and Austin City Council: My name is <name> and I am the <job title> at <organization>. I am writing in support of Agenda Item 55 that will be considered by Council on November 14, 2019. Our city-owned hotel is expected to generate $32 million next year, and the total projected interest for investors and Wall Street on the bonds backing this hotel is more than $100 million. The City of Austin should do everything in its power to ensure working families in Austin get the best financial deal from the city-owned convention center headquarters hotel. **As the Republican-passed revenue cap legislation takes effect in Austin, we need to ensure public accountability at ACE to help alleviate the $58 million projected budget deficit in our city.** Sincerely, _Agenda Item 55 Talking Points_ **The City of Austin should do everything in its power to ensure working families in Austin get the best financial deal from the city-owned convention center headquarters hotel.**
* Our city-owned hotel is expected to generate $32 million next year, and the total projected interest for investors and Wall Street on the bonds backing this hotel is more than $100 million;
* The “Excess Revenues Fund” is expected to have deposits totaling $187 million by 2034;
* By exercising its rights under the 2017 indenture and ACE bylaws, the City of Austin could see additional revenues for eligible capital project expenditures for public facilities in the approximate area that would directly or indirectly benefit the city-owned hotel;
* These expenditures on public facilities could include parks, playgrounds, swimming pools, and health facilities, and can benefit the broader Austin community.
* As the Republican-passed revenue cap legislation takes effect in Austin, we need to exercise options like this to help alleviate the $58 million projected budget deficit in our city.

**Expenses at Austin Convention Enterprises are increasing.**
* The net budget for Austin Convention Enterprises has nearly doubled from $627,044 in 2014 to $1,212,632 in 2019.
* Budget expenditures for the consultant to ACE have increased from $73,692 in 2014 to a budgeted amount of $132,000 in 2019, a 79% increase.
* According to ACE’s internal documents, fees for the ACE Asset Manager totaled $97,260 in 2014. In 2016, those fees rose to $142,960 and are now $204,000 annually, a 109% increase from 2014.
* According to ACE’s internal documents, expenses for the Asset Manager are listed as $4,433 in 2014 and $4,280 in 2015. Those fees increased to $9,680 in 2017; and a budgeted $10,000 for expenses in 2019.

**The City of Austin must take steps to ensure public accountability at Austin Convention Enterprises, Inc.**
* Article 1, Section 3 of the bylaws for Austin Convention Enterprises give Austin City Council the right to “approve all programs and expenditures” of Austin Convention Enterprises.
* The City of Austin Charter requires that a “contract or an amendment to a contract, involving an expenditure of more than forty-three thousand dollars annually must be expressly approved by the council.”

That means strengthening unions and making them more democratic, and today we’re reaching out with an ask from one of our local unions here in Austin. UNITE HERE is a union representing workers in the hotel, food service, laundry, warehouse, and casino gaming industries, and this week they are calling on folks to support the passage of an Austin City Council resolution regarding Austin Convention Enterprises. ACE owns Austin’s public hotel, and the resolution ensures financial transparency and public accountability from ACE as** they run a hotel that belongs to the people of Austin. To lend your support to UNITE HERE’s efforts, please: Call council members and let them know you support Agenda Item 55 on November 14, 2019 using the talking points below; Register in support of Agenda Item 55 starting next week at City Hall; Write a quick to let them know you support Agenda Item 55 using the suggested email below. # Campaign Highlights & Happenings
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu7u9Yg_qOhE5BHawenA4Z4Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=2)
### Ballot Access: We are officially on the ballot for two states and counting!
On November 8th, the campaign filed paperwork with the Alabama GOP to become a qualified candidate on the ballot. [With those filings, Gov. Weld is the only major challenger to Donald Trump who will be on the ballot in Alabama and Arkansas.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=mFNW28pW3ISCUN17HPsN5LF65w1wOP8hNB-hqfGAgG9LWG7vDnrWMpP0rn4gyhZR&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=3) Additionally, on November 8th, the Michigan Secretary of State released the list of candidates on the state’s ballot, [which included Governor Weld.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ZnXwEaZtoMi-S5NDI6BlQRkP-Hw9xvtsspwWe7LNH8n9jk9jFduA_ll06LtRvLoK1n9PRtByDdB8_0-00qz8UUW94b3UFkWhmrHzXQZyWAkqbu51SpGkpokIDqeyT_Q6AQd1HO83u_hw3KyGBYIH0UyU26E8Mc7DVRJcFcYKKOo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=4) By the end of the day today, Governor Weld will also be on the Arkansas Republican ballot and tomorrow, the Governor will file his Declaration of Candidacy in New Hampshire. | | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu7u9Yg_qOhE5BHawenA4Z4Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=5)
---
## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### Boston Herald: _Bill Weld: I've seen enough, Time for Trump to go_
"The recent actions of Republican Party officials in several states to cancel presidential primaries, organized and directed by the Trump organization in Washington, D.C., are not merely anti-democracy: they amount to an organized insurrection against our democratic elections and our Constitution that protects them."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=M_ahLUVJ8XpyMWq3jSlm0huJjQ627IzuJGj35Sm-UzJGJvaOKmnxezj-UEdor0ByP8agyD_RZmmuFH55SXiLROZLq-fPWejcvz2FTjJRfAWHAY7R5ueqklgL0FpvhcwG&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=6)
### BuzzFeedNews: _Texting with Bill Weld: "100% Democratic Rule" If Senate Republicans Listen to Trump_
"In The Stakes 2020, BuzzFeed News' political newsletter, Bill Weld, who is challenging Donald Trump for the Republican nomination, says Republicans are abandoning their duty to the Constitution and explains his weird Reese's Pieces habit."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=31LENR9BgsePFvyAr7aruLmEHnkBLPWLYigUUVsFUbhl5BwRZPjK-XNBvts8z0e2Ec5RUJ2O2fb_fbGZg9w8Vxtcrfe8ZSEfj_veGUqmtuXIgARNmp_cYIRy9sZDnVdv&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=7)
### E&E News: _Republican presidential hopeful bets on climate message_
"President Trump's main Republican primary challenger for next year's election is talking more and more about climate change."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=rv0eovqAhGSh94AWLFLfBwnrkeWU0y3CVgM1pJkwnM6MDoRVqMWOhcXDikmMG7_0&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191112_newsletter_s&n=8)

name: Stephanie Schmid
subject: Healthcare is a human right. Join me to fight for it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
I'm going to Washington to protect your healthcare. I want you to come and join me.
|
---

| | Friends, Nine years ago, Democrats passed sweeping healthcare legislation that ensured affordable healthcare for all. A few months later, Republicans, including Chris Smith, took control of Congress and spent years unsuccessfully attempting to take that healthcare away. **If Republicans flip Congress back in 2020, they have promised to continue their fight to take away our healthcare, and we know Chris Smith will be right there with the rest of his fellow Republicans just like last time. We cannot let them win.** [**Will you join me in the fight to protect our healthcare?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08c/522d4087/7afd2611/4f341c01/2536940879/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/health-care?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+me+in+the+fight+to+protect&utm_campaign=20191112_em&source=20191112_em") | **[PROTECT OUR HEALTHCARE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08c/522d4087/7afd2611/4f341c00/2536940879/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/health-care?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+PROTECT+OUR+HEALTHCARE&utm_campaign=20191112_em&source=20191112_em")**
---
**This fight is personal to me**. I myself have a pre-existing condition like 303,900 residents of this district.
When I go to Washington, I will never cast a vote to take away people's healthcare.
When I go to Washington, I will expand protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
And when I go to Washington, I will never, ever, cast a vote that puts the government into the exam room, which should be a private space for patients and doctors.
Healthcare is a human right. No parent should ever have to choose between putting food on the table or paying a medical bill, no young adult should go uninsured while trying to find a job after college, and no one with a pre-existing condition should ever have to worry about getting the services they need.
**We must protect our healthcare. And when I go to Washington, you will have a passionate advocate representing our community.**
**[Can you sign my petition to protect and improve our healthcare?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08c/522d4087/7afd2611/4f341c3f/2536940879/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/health-care?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+sign+my+petition+to+protect+and+&utm_campaign=20191112_em&source=20191112_em")**
**[PROTECT OUR HEALTHCARE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08c/522d4087/7afd2611/4f341c3e/2536940879/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/health-care?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+PROTECT+OUR+HEALTHCARE&utm_campaign=20191112_em&source=20191112_em")**
---
Let's fight the good fight,
Stephanie

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My friend Doug Jones needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

Last week, former Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced he's running against Doug Jones for Alabama's Senate seat. At a time when Washington is already too partisan and polarized, we can't afford to lose Doug's voice. Will you chip in to Doug's campaign to help him hold on to his place in the Senate? I was so proud in 2017 when the people of Alabama united to reject Roy Moore's divisive rhetoric and record, and instead sent a genuine public servant in Doug Jones to the U.S. Senate. Doug hasn't let them down. He's spent the last two years working hard on behalf of the people who sent him there. The people of Alabama -- and the whole country -- deserve leaders who are committed to bringing the country together and getting things done, like defending and expanding access to health care in every ZIP code and fighting for fair wages and good-paying jobs. **[We need to step up and help out. clean_body: | | Derek, Last week, former Attorney General Jeff Sessions announced he's running against Doug Jones for Alabama's Senate seat. At a time when Washington is already too partisan and polarized, we can't afford to lose Doug's voice. Will you chip in to Doug's campaign to help him hold on to his place in the Senate? I was so proud in 2017 when the people of Alabama united to reject Roy Moore's divisive rhetoric and record, and instead sent a genuine public servant in Doug Jones to the U.S. Senate. Doug hasn't let them down. He's spent the last two years working hard on behalf of the people who sent him there. The people of Alabama -- and the whole country -- deserve leaders who are committed to bringing the country together and getting things done, like defending and expanding access to health care in every ZIP code and fighting for fair wages and good-paying jobs. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" "" Thank you, Tim Kaine * | "" "" ""

He's an incredible candidate -- passionate and steadfast in his political convictions, and a fierce advocate for those he wants to serve. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - As an Air Force pilot, I know how much our veterans sacrifice to serve our country. You miss out on huge milestones for your friends and family, and you risk your life to protect your fellow Americans. Mark Kelly -- an exciting candidate running for US Senate in Arizona -- not only did that when he joined the US Navy and flew combat missions, but also when he piloted the NASA Space Shuttle on multiple missions. He 's an incredible candidate \-- passionate and steadfast in his political convictions, and a fierce advocate for those he wants to serve. But the Senate race in Arizona is heating up. The polling is closer than ever, and Republicans are spending huge amounts of money to keep their Senate majority. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" I was motivated to run for office to build a brighter future for my two young sons. Our children will be facing mountains they're incapable of climbing if we don't act on gun violence, climate change, and election security immediately. Mark knows firsthand how important it is that we combat the gun violence epidemic, and knows how crucial it is that we act immediately on the climate crisis. Mark will be a crucial voice in the Senate, advocating for the safety and future of our next generations. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Let's make a change, Nikki | | If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio Nikki Foster for Ohio PO Box 537 Mason, OH 45040 mailto:info@nikkifosteroh.com "" ""

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham's impeachment lies leaving his Senate seat vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham has spent the last weeks contorting his previous stances in every way possible to defend Trump against the impeachment proceedings. He's even refusing to read the transcripts of the House interviews, claiming they wouldn't change his mind anyways. He's now trying to unmask the whistleblower, saying the entire impeachment inquiry is "invalid" without their testimony. Graham's B.S. is threatening the safety of this and any future whistleblower \-- so we need to work to get Lindsey and all of his fellow Trump-enabling senators out of office. Lindsey Graham's re-election campaign is flush with cash from large-money donors and corporate PACs, but Jaime Harrison, Graham's Democratic opponent, is making major headway with two back-to-back record-breaking fundraising quarters. We're asking voters what they think about Lindsey Graham and his re-election race, and we need 119 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you support Lindsey Graham?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc03/6e9863e8/1652aeef/1db09a75/1112945511/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aT0gHfEQ") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc03/6e9863e8/1652aeef/1db09a75/1112945511/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aT0gHfEQ") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc03/6e9863e8/1652aeef/1db09a7b/1112945511/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=OUT20191112c.ND-b&refcode2=fAcUQ75wkC7enrJza7LS")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This deadline is very real
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The freeze is coming.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7546?t=3&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB) Friend, We're facing a HUGE deadline: **A month from Thursday, we have to stop raising money. Full stop.** Let me explain. Here in Washington state, we have a "legislative session freeze" that keeps any state officials from fundraising in the 30 days before and then during the Washington state legislative session. So while several of my opponents can raise as much as they can -- and while the Republican Governors Association can stockpile cash -- I'm not going to be able to raise a penny for my campaign. _Not a penny for nearly four months._ I won't sugarcoat it: It's pretty frustrating to think that Republicans can keep raking in cash to try to take back the governorship next year while our fundraising is frozen. We know that the Republican Governors Association has raised nearly $200 million already and has only three Democratic incumbents to target in 2020. **So when I ask you to make a grassroots donation before the freeze, it's because it really matters. We've set an ambitious goal of raising $25,000 by Thursday at midnight:** [**Will you donate $1 or more right now before the legislative freeze goes into effect?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7546?t=4&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7547?t=5&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7548?t=6&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7549?t=7&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7550?t=8&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7551?t=9&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7552?t=10&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7546?t=11&akid=7984%2E868730%2EfxJfIB)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Listen to the black women who power our victories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eb9/2413335026/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")
---
| | On Sunday, I took a bold stance and became the first Presidential candidate in 50 years to advocate that we change the order of states that begin our Democratic nominating process. While there has been blowback among some party faithful in Iowa and New Hampshire, folks across the country have rallied behind this simple truth--black women have empowered our Democratic victories and their voices deserve to be heard right from the beginning. I understand for many folks in both states this is a tradition that they hold very dear, and I have learned first hand that they take their role in vetting candidates seriously. [**But "this is how it's always been done" isn't ever a good reason to keep doing it.**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eb8/2413335026/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-grassrootsfund?refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+But+ldquothis+is+how+itrsquos+always+bee&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal") The current system does not give enough of a voice to people of color and it's long past time that we as Democrats practice what we preach and fix it. | | **[**Contribute >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Contribute+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
---

To be clear, this isn't about which candidates voters in these states may choose, or have chosen in the past. This is about who gets to do the choosing.

Some of my opponents have dismissed this suggestion. I'm not surprised. [**If I am the only candidate who is willing to highlight this disparity and advocate for change, so be it.**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ea6/2413335026/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-grassrootsfund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+If+I+am+the+only+candidate+who+is+willin&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")

The Democratic nominating process needs to reflect America. We can't say that black women are the backbone of our party, then support starting our nominating process in two states with such a low representation of black folks in them.

We can't say that we are the party that will fight against voter suppression and structural racism in our political system and then turn around and effectively exclude black and brown voices from the first portion of our nominating process.

During my ten months on the campaign trail, I visited Iowa and New Hampshire numerous times, and I met many wonderful people who take their duties as voters in the first in the nation contests very seriously. I appreciate how hard they work to make the best, most informed decision possible.

[However, with so many in the establishment against me - I need your support more than ever. If you believe that my voice is important in this democratic process, please consider making a contribution of just $15 right now to help me keep up the fight. ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ea5/2413335026/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-grassrootsfund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+However+with+so+many+in+the+establishmen&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ea4/2413335026/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+amount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
---

**[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ea3/2413335026/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+secondamount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
---

**[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ea2/2413335026/VEsO/p/eyJlM3QwYUdseVpGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+thirdamount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
---

**[**Chip in $100 now >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ea1/2413335026/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+fourthamount+now+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
---

**[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+Chip+in+another+amount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
---

With gratitude,
Julian
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eaf/2413335026/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eae/2413335026/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9ead/2413335026/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eac/2413335026/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eab/2413335026/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc821/3eb3e2fc/568b5e4f/744d9eaa/2413335026/VEsHAw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal&source=20191112_em_fr_b4_castro_all_internal"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: Where we stand on our goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---

We're working to make Washington work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. But it's going to take all of us -- from Cresco, from Pennsylvania, and across the country -- coming together and building this movement one day at a time.

Team Warren has been hard at work in states across the country -- we've hired staff on the ground and started organizing communities to build a movement that will not only elect Elizabeth next year, but Democrats up and down the ballot in Pennsylvania and across America.

**We're making progress now -- but we need your help to continue to power this movement forward.**

The average first donation for people in your state is $19 -- and when thousands of people chip in just $19 at a time, it translates into real impact in growing this movement in Pennsylvania and across the country.

**[Can you represent Team Warren from Pennsylvania and make your first donation of $19 today? We're looking for 118 new donations from Pennsylvania today to keep up this important work.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528809/45c30650/1042a3b4e/66f47571/2289841639/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDQyRl9FR1JfQVZHX1RfMjAxOTExMTJfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML42F_EGR_AVG_T_20191112_V1S1_P_T1")**

name: Monika Johnson-Hostler
subject: I want to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Will you watch this video?

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d960/7dfbb003/42ac7e2e/5527abc2/1108151512/VEsH/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_2019_em_onboard1&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_2019_em_onboard1&source=rtw_2019_em_onboard1")
---
Friend,

My name is Monika. I'm an HBCU graduate and a mother. I'm also the Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, where I have advocated for thousands of children and women over the last 20 years. I'm on my third term on the board of education for one of the largest school districts in North Carolina.

I'm running for U.S Congress because I believe it's time we had someone representing us who believes that serving is about integrity.

If you've got a few seconds, will you watch this video? I want to introduce myself and this campaign!

[](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d960/7dfbb003/42ac7e2e/5527abc3/1108151512/VEsE/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-welcomevideo?refcode=rtw_2019_em_onboard1&recurring=auto&refcode2=image&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=rtw_2019_em_onboard1&source=rtw_2019_em_onboard1")
Thank you for joining this grassroots, people-powered campaign! I'm so grateful to have your support.

More soon,
Monika
---
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d960/7dfbb003/42ac7e2e/5527abc0/1108151512/VEsF/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_2019_em_onboard1&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_2019_em_onboard1&source=rtw_2019_em_onboard1")
---

PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS

Monika for Congress
PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Rodney Reed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Hi,

It’s been over a week since I left the campaign trail and it’s been so
good being home with family and hearing all of your support. I’m grateful
to have so many of you at my back. So today, I’m asking you to join me in
helping someone else.

I’m reaching out in the interests of justice for a man who is about to be
wrongly executed. On November 20th, the state of Texas plans to execute
Rodney Reed despite overwhelming evidence that points to his innocence.

Governor Greg Abbott has the power to stop the execution. He’s done it
before, he can absolutely do it again. So our job is to make sure that we
cause an outcry so loud, so united that Abbott has no choice but to listen
to our demands and cancel the execution.

Here are the 2 best ways you can help save this man’s life and put
pressure on Governor Abbott:

* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41921?t=1001&akid=66892%2E444211%2ELpeMG_ ]Sign the petition. Add your name to the petition and join millions
of other people in urgently demanding Governor Abbott to stop the
execution.
* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42001?t=1002&akid=66892%2E444211%2ELpeMG_ ]Make phone calls. With only 8 days left, we need to ramp up the
pressure and show the urgency of our demands.

* Dial this Number: (512) 967-0567
* With this number, you’ll be connected to Governor Abbott’s office
and other influential people with the power to stop or delay Reed’s
execution. Before you’re connected, you’ll be provided some
pointers on what to say during the call. If you get sent to
voicemail, please leave a message and try calling again whenever
you can.

Rodney Reed has been on death row since 1998, alleging him responsible for
the murder and rape of Stacey Stites.

Since his arrest, Reed has faced mountains of unfair challenges –– not
uncommon in our broken incarceration system –– in proving his innocence.
He was repeatedly denied DNA testing that could support his case, critical
pieces of evidence were withheld from his trial, and in the end an
all-white jury convicted Reed. Despite his flawed trial and evidence from
a new witness claiming that Stites’ ex-fiancé admitted in prison that he’s
responsible for the murder of Stites, Reed remained on death row.

When you look at the facts, it becomes painfully clear
that going forward with executing Rodney Reed would be absolutely wrong.

It’s our duty to stand up to this unfair, racist incarceration system and
fight for every single human’s right to find justice.

Please take a couple of minutes out of your day to [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41921?t=1003&akid=66892%2E444211%2ELpeMG_ ]sign the petition or
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42001?t=1004&akid=66892%2E444211%2ELpeMG_ ]call Governor Abbott’s office before time runs out.

Thanks for your help,

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191112footer&t=1005&refcode2=66892_444211_LpeMG_&akid=66892%2E444211%2ELpeMG_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=66892%2E444211%2ELpeMG_

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Tina Smith
subject: Good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm writing to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate before the mid-month deadline. Give me a moment to explain why.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team --

In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate as part of our mid-month fundraising push. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important.

The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising target for the month. November has been pretty terrible for this kind of thing -- the holidays are inching closer and folks are just beginning to tune out.

With so much going on in Washington, I need to stay focused on fighting for our progressive values in the Senate and making sure Democrats don't lose this seat (and with it, virtually any chance to flip the majority).

But trying to keep Minnesota blue and doing my job to protect our health care, defend reproductive freedom, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and more has left me with very little time to worry about our fundraising.

The good news is that we're not that far behind where we need to be for November. A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline on Friday should do the trick.

Now, here's the part where I ask for your help:

**Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota before the mid-month deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focus on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Donate now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191112-lme?refcode=em191112-lme&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work out on the road in Minnesota. Every dollar you give keeps me off the phones, dialing for dollars, and instead focused on fighting for our values -- and if we're successful, I'll continue our fight in the U.S. Senate.

I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on, and I'm so grateful you are part of the team. Thanks.

-- Tina

name: Josh Mahony
subject: My announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U
body:
| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d76/382d5bd5/7053e8b/3b0755f6/3213719830/VEsH/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://joshuamahony.com/")
---
| Friend,

Today I am officially announcing that I am withdrawing from the race for United States Senate. This has been one of the most difficult decisions that I have ever had to make, but it was also one that had to be made.

Over these past few months, while criss-crossing the state of Arkansas, I have been working through a family health matter that was needing my increasing attention. As the days wore on, it became obvious to me that I was needed more at home with my loved ones and that I did not have the focus and energy necessary to devote to the campaign.

I cannot begin to tell you how much your support of our efforts has meant to me. I have been humbled by the thousands of people who joined us in fighting for a better Arkansas. You all are the true warriors in this campaign. Together, we created a strong grassroots movement, which I hope will continue the fight to change Washington for the better.

I am so grateful for having met so many of you on the campaign trail and it is with my most sincere gratitude that I leave you with.

-Josh
---
---

PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U.S. SENATE

P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States
